settings.title: Insights for PMs, Leaders, and Firm Executives

settings.editor:
Over 5 million downloads and counting…
For years, EMI has been creating practical, people-first content for engineering and AEC professionals. Our podcast network has been recognized across the industry, including features from major media outlets, and has been highlighted by Forbes as one of the most inspiring shows for professionals.

Our active podcasts are a core part of EMI’s Project Management Ecosystem  a connected system of learning, tools, and community designed to support AEC project managers through every stage of their career, while helping companies develop and retain high-performing PMs.

Start with one of our active shows below. Past series are available in the archives.
Real stories and straightforward strategies to help AEC project managers lead better projects, teams, and clients.
Actionable lessons and candid conversations for current and aspiring AEC leaders who want to grow their impact.
Unfiltered insights from AEC firm leaders on strategy, growth, talent, and what it really takes to run a successful practice today.

settings.title: The AEC AI & Tech Strategy Podcast (AI in Tech)

settings.editor: Clear, real-world conversations on how AEC firms are using AI and emerging tech to work smarter, scale faster, and stay competitive.
Abiweekly show with a goal of helping civil engineering professionals succeed by showcasing interesting projects and successful civil engineering professionals.
Looking for one of our earlier series? You can still access every episode here.
The Engineering Management Institute Blog contains weekly articles written by experts in the field of engineering, leadership, engineering management, and other related career development topics.
The Engineering Management Institute YouTube channel contains interviews of experts in the field of engineering, leadership, engineering management, and other related career development topics.

metadata._yoast_wpseo_metadesc: Forbes named our podcast among the 15 most inspiring as we continue developing leading content for engineers.
